Inline math
.
$1+1 = 2$
.
<p><span class="mathjax-exps">$1+1 = 2$</span></p>
.

Block math (inline context)
.
$$1+1 = 2$$
.
<p><div class="mathjax-exps">$$1+1 = 2$$</div></p>
.

Block math (multiline)
.
$$
1+1 = 2
$$
.
<p><div class="mathjax-exps">$$
1+1 = 2
$$</div></p>
.

Inline math with LaTeX commands
.
$\alpha + \beta$
.
<p><span class="mathjax-exps">$\alpha + \beta$</span></p>
.

Not math: space after opening $
.
$ not math $
.
<p>$ not math $</p>
.

Not math: space before closing $
.
$not math $
.
<p><span class="mathjax-exps">$not math $</span></p>
.

Not math: no content
.
$$
.
<p>$$</p>
.

Inline math with escaped dollar
.
$a \$ b$
.
<p><span class="mathjax-exps">$a \$ b$</span></p>
.

Adjacent math expressions
.
$a$ and $b$
.
<p><span class="mathjax-exps">$a$</span> and <span class="mathjax-exps">$b$</span></p>
.

Math in emphasis
.
*$a$*
.
<p><em><span class="mathjax-exps">$a$</span></em></p>
.
